command_preview: try { $adapter = Get-PnpDevice -Class Bluetooth -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq 'Error' -or $_.Status -eq 'Degraded' -or $_.Status -eq 'Unknown' -or $_.Status -eq 'OK' } | Select-Object -First 1; if ($adapter) { Enable-PnpDevice -InstanceId $adapter.InstanceId -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $btRadio = Get-PnpDevice -Class Bluetooth | Select-Object Status, Name, InstanceId | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output "Bluetooth Devices:`n$btRadio"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Runtime.WindowsRuntime; $asTaskGeneric = ([System.WindowsRuntimeSystemExtensions].GetMethods() | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'AsTask' -and $_.GetParameters().Count -eq 1 -and $_.GetParameters()[0].ParameterType.Name -eq 'IAsyncOperation`1' })[0]; function Await($WinRtTask, $Re
